title: French-Style Quesadilla
description: A unique fusion of French and Mexican cuisine, this French-Style Quesadilla combines the flavors of charred onions and Canadian bacon with melted cheese inside a crispy tortilla.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Cook the Canadian bacon for 2-3 minutes per side, or until crispy.
Add the charred onions to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Add the cooked Canadian bacon and charred onions on top of the cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the tortilla is crispy.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the other side is crispy.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve hot.
